seo.title: Partnerships | HeartLink
seo.description: HeartLink collaborates with established matchmakers and trusted connectors under clear privacy standards.

hero.title: Trusted networks. A stronger standard.
hero.description: HeartLink works with established matchmakers, family connectors and private-client advisers when privacy, family trust and client care are aligned.

models.title: Partner with clear privacy standards.
models.description: Every partnership begins with a conversation, but it must protect client privacy and family trust from the first conversation onward.

cards.label: 01 · Profile collaboration
cards.title: Work together on a match.
cards.description: Share selected opportunities across trusted networks while protecting each client relationship.

cards.label: 02 · Referral partnership
cards.title: Refer clients with confidence.
cards.description: Introduce families whose needs fit HeartLink through a clear and private referral process.

cards.label: 03 · HeartLink network
cards.title: Join our partner network.
cards.description: Experienced matchmakers and trusted connectors can explore working with HeartLink's standards, systems and wider network.

form.title: Introduce your practice.
form.introduction: Tell us about your practice, network and the kind of collaboration you have in mind. We review partnership enquiries privately.

fields.name: message
fields.label: About your network and proposed collaboration

form.consent: I consent to HeartLink using these details to review and respond to this partnership enquiry.
